description: Storefront (customer-facing) specific API calls including login, registration, and site context management

endpoints.name: Storefront Login

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Authenticates customer and redirects based on role. Currently COMMENTED OUT - uses mock localStorage login instead.
frontendUsage.currentStatus: INACTIVE (commented out). Mock login checks admin credentials (admin/admin123) and localStorage-registered users.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: On success: admin users -> /dashboard, customers -> /home. Token stored in localStorage. Shows error toast on failure.

endpoints.name: Send OTP (Registration Step 1)
endpoints.description: Send verification OTP to email for registration

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: First step of registration. User enters email and phone, OTP is sent to email. This is the ONLY actively used real API call in the storefront.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, form transitions to Step 2 (OTP input). Error message displayed under email field.

endpoints.name: Verify OTP & Register (Registration Step 2)
endpoints.description: Verify OTP and complete registration with full user data

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Second step of registration. Sends OTP code along with full registration details as FormData (multipart). On success, stores token and navigates to login.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows loading spinner during verification. On success: stores token as 'dealora_token' and user as 'user_info' in localStorage, navigates to /login. Error message displayed under OTP field.

endpoints.name: Site Context (All localStorage)
endpoints.description: Storefront site-wide state management via React Context + localStorage. Manages orders, tickets, profile, products, categories, and announcements entirely client-side.

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Wraps entire storefront. Provides: currentUser, orders, products, categories, tickets, messages, announcement, and functions for all CRUD operations. All data persisted in localStorage.

localStorageKeys.dealora_market_admin_data: Admin config, products, categories, hero slider data

functions.name: loginUser(user, token)
functions.description: Set current user and persist to localStorage

functions.name: logoutUser()
functions.description: Clear current user and token from state and localStorage

functions.name: updateUserPassword(oldPassword, newPassword)
functions.description: Change password (NOTE: does not verify old password)

functions.name: createOrder(orderPayload)
functions.description: Create new order, decrement product stock. Order shape: {id, items, totalPrice, customerDetails, paymentMethod, status, createdAt}

functions.name: adminReplyToMessage(msgId, replyText, fileBase64)
functions.description: Admin reply to contact message + sync to ticket

functions.name: publishAnnouncement(text, titleAr, titleEn, totalVal, totalUnit, colors)

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Not directly displayed - powers all storefront data. Products appear in catalog, orders in order history, announcements as top banner, tickets in support section.
